name: Eagle Eye I
effect: You have attack range +1.
flavour: If I can see it, I can hit it.

name: Eagle Eye II
effect: You have attack range +2. You always ignore armor.
flavour: Yeah, why shoot the armor?

name: Long Shot I
effect: Add 2 damage to your attack action if target is at range 2 or more.
flavour: Sure, it's a long shot. But Bjorn enjoys a challenge.

name: Long Shot II
effect: Add damage to wach attack action based on the distance to the target (e.g. add 3 damage if the target is 3 areas away). Oh, and always ignore cover.

name: Nailed Together I
effect: If you kill a monster in an attack action, all remaining damage may be dealt to a second monster behind it (adjacent and further away).

name: Nailed Together II
effect: If you kill a monster in an attack action, all remaining damage may be dealt to the next monster behind it (adjacent and further away), and so on.

name: Stitching I
effect: Remove 1 damage from any hero or equipment within range 1.
flavour: If you're in a pinch, Bjorn can patch.

name: Stitching II
effect: Remove a total of 2 damage from heroes and equipment within range 1.

name: Suppressive Fire I
effect: Once per monster turn, prevent a rank 1 or rank 2 monster within range 3 from moving. You cannot choose the same monster next turn.

name: Suppressive Fire II
effect: Once per monster turn, prevent a monster within range 3 from moving. You cannot choose the same monster next turn.

name: Sure Shot I
effect: 3[MANA]: Deal 3 damage to a monster within attack range.
flavour: Who needs luck when you have certainty?

name: Sure Shot II
effect: 2-4[MANA]: Deal that much damage to a monster within attack range.

name: Flexibility I
effect:
1[MANA]: Move +1.
2[MANA]: Attack range +1 this turn.
2[MANA]: Add 2 damage to your attack action.

name: Flexibility II
effect:
1[MANA]: Move +1.
2[MANA]: Attack range +1 this turn.
2[MANA]: Add 2 damage to your attack action.
2[MANA]: Draw 1 card.

name: Hail of Arrows I
effect: 3[MANA]: Deal 1 damage to 3 monsters within attack range.

name: Hail of Arrows II
effect: 1-4[MANA]: Deal 1 damage to that many different monsters within attack range.

name: Snipe I
effect: Roll 2[DIE_ATTACK] against a monster within attack range.

name: Snipe II
effect: Roll 5[DIE_ATTACK] against a monster within attack range.

name: Starsong I
effect: At the end of your turn, draw 1 additional card.

name: Starsong II
effect: At the end of your turn, draw 2 additional cards. You may have 5 cards in hand.

name: Suppressive Fire I
effect: Once per monster turn, prevent a rank 1 or rank 2 monster within range 3 from moving. You cannot choose the same monster next turn.

name: Suppressive Fire II
effect: Once per monster turn, prevent any monster within range 3 from moving. You cannot choose the same monster next turn.

name: Treetreader I
effect: Move into an adjacent forest area, or move out of a forest area.
flavour: I will make like a tree and leave.

name: Treetreader II
effect: Move into an adjacent forest area, or move out of a forest area. Each time you move into a forest area, heal 1 damage.
flavour: All good things are tree.

name: Fleetfoot I
effect: Move 1 area.
flavour: Oh no, she's surrounding us!

name: Fleetfoot II
effect: Move 1 area. You may always move into mountains and through occupied areas.

name: In Charge I
effect: After each move action, you may kill an adjacent rank 1 monster.

name: In Charge II
effect: After each move action, you may kill an adjacent rank 1 or rank 2 monster.

name: Queen of the Hill I
effect: Deal 2 damage to an adjacent monster and switch places with it.
flavour: Let's dance...

name: Queen of the Hill II
effect: Deal 4 damage to an adjacent monster and switch places with it.
flavour: Another round? Ok!

name: Reaper Swing I
effect: In each attack action, you may divide the damage you deal between the target and another adjacent monster.

name: Reaper Swing II
effect: In each attack action, you may divide the damage you deal between the target and another adjacent monster.

name: Riposte I
effect: 2[MANA]: Prevent up to 2 damage dealt by an adjacent monster, and deal 2 damage to it.

name: Riposte II
effect: 3[MANA]: Prevent up to 3 damge dealt by an adjacent monster, and deal 3 damage to it.
flavour: What goes around comes around... with interest.

name: Swift Kick I
effect: Deal 1 damage to an adjacent non-legend monster and move it 1 area.

name: Swift Kick II
effect: Deal 2 damage to an adjacent non-legend monster and move it 2 areas.

name: Beefy Berserker I
effect: Runes [RUNE] always count as hits for you. Because that's the way you roll.

name: Beefy Berserker II
effect: Runes [RUNE] always count as hits for you. It runes in the family.

name: Dreadnought I
effect: 1[MANA]: Prevent 1 damage.
flavour: Armor so heavy that even gravity's jealous.

name: Dreadnought II
effect: 1[MANA]: Prevent 1 damage. Each adjacent monster that attacks you is dealt 1 damage after its attack.

name: Fortified I
effect: Heal 1 damage from Boldur.
flavour: It's not hiding, it's strategic positioning.

name: Fortified II
effect: Heal 1 damage from Boldur.

name: Rapid Strike I
effect: 3[MANA]: Perform an attack action.

name: Rapid Strike II
effect: 2[MANA]: Perform an attack action. May be used several times per turn.

name: Sweeping Strike I
effect: Add 1 damage to each attack action. If an adjacent monster is killed in your attack action, any remaining damage may be dealt to a second monster in clockwise order.

name: Sweeping Strike II
effect: Add 1 damage per adjacent monster to each attack action. If an adjacent monster is killed in your attack action, any remaining damage may be dealt to a second monster in clockwise order.

name: Wrecking Ball I
effect: Boldur may move into occupied areas. Deal 1 damage to that character and move it 1 area.
flavour: He's on a roll!

name: Wrecking Ball II
effect: Boldur may move into occupied areas. Deal 1 damage to that character and move it 1 area. You have move +1.

name: Déjà Vu I
effect: Once per turn, when playing a card, perform its effect twice.
flavour: Wait a minute, didn't you just do that?

name: Déjà Vu II
effect: Once per turn, when playing a card, perform its effect twice, then return it to hand.
flavour: Wait a minute, didn't you just read that?

name: Elementary Student I
effect: Add 1 mana [MANA] to any card.
flavour: Finkel is on fire today!

name: Elementary Student II
effect: Add 1 mana [MANA] to each card that generates [MANA].
flavour: Finkel is on FIRE today!

name: Fireball I
effect: 3-5[MANA]: Get attack range +1 and add that many [DIE_ATTACK] to your next attack action.
flavour: Goodness gracious

name: Fireball II
effect: 4-8[MANA]: Get attack range +1 and add that many [DIE_ATTACK] to your next attack action. Alsodeal 1 damage to each character adjacent to the target.
flavour: ...great balls of fire!

name: Fire Spark I
effect: 2[MANA]: Roll 3[DIE_ATTACK] against an adjacent monster where runes [RUNE] count as hits.
flavour: The light at the end of the tunnel is coming toward you.

name: Fire Spark II
effect: 2[MANA]: Roll 4[DIE_ATTACK] against an adjacent monster where runes [RUNE] count as hits.
flavour: Inventing spectacular new fireworks.

name: Melt I
effect: 1-2[MANA]: Kill an adjacent monster with that much remaining health.
flavour: I'm melting! I'm melting!

name: Melt II
effect: 1-4[MANA]: Kill an adjacent monster with that much remaining health.
flavour: Blub blub blub…

name: Twister I
effect: 2[MANA]: Move any character (except Legends) within range 2 up to 2 areas.
flavour: I got carried away…

name: Twister II
effect: 2[MANA]: Move any character (except Legends) within range 2 up to 2 areas. May be used once per character.
flavour: Relocates houses, little girls, and even their dogs.

name: Chain Reaction I
effect: 3[MANA]: Roll 3[DIE_ATTACK], 2[DIE_ATTACK], and 1[DIE_ATTACK] against 3 monsters (respectively) within range 2.
flavour: A cascade of calamity.

name: Chain Reaction II
effect: 4[MANA]: Roll 3, 2, and 1 damage to 3 monsters (respectively) within range 2.

name: Confusion I
effect: 2[MANA]: Attack with a non-legend monster within range 2.

name: Confusion II
effect: 2[MANA]: Attack with a non-legend monster within range 3. May be used several times per turn with different monsters.

name: Discipline I
effect: Add 1 mana [MANA] to any card or gain 1 experience [XP].

name: Discipline II
effect: Add 1 mana [MANA] to any card, gain 1 experience [XP], and draw 1 card.

name: Meditation I
effect: Freely move mana [MANA] from Meditation to other cards.
flavour: Meditating? Sleeping? Both do wonders for you.

name: Meditation II
effect: Freely move mana [MANA] between your cards.
flavour: Repeat until you reach enlightenment: ”Wah Tefu Layam”.

name: Spark I
effect: 2[MANA]: Add 2 damage to this attack action.
flavour: A spark is all it takes.

name: Spark II
effect: 1-3[MANA]: Add that much damage to this attack action.
flavour: Some people just have that spark.

name: Stonesoul I
effect: 1[MANA]: If you stand adjacent to a mountain, deal 1 damage to a monster within range 2. May be used once per monster.
flavour: Her feet are firmly planted in midair.

name: Stonesoul II
effect: 2[MANA]: If you stand adjacent to a mountain, deal 2 damage to a monster within range 2. May be used once per monster.
flavour: She's completely stoned…

name: Bjorn's First Bow
effect: This is your Main Weapon. Attack range 2.
flavour: Not something he's proud of. Still not bad for a five-year-old.

name: Black Arrows
quest: Spend 1 attack action in the Robber Camp to loot it.
effect:
Starts with 3 arrows here (use zxp> markers).
Spend 1 arrow to add 3 damage to this attack action.
flavour: Painted black for the funeral they are about to attend.

name: Bone Bane Bow
quest: Spend a mend action on Nailfare to bind the relics.
effect:
This is your Main Weapon. Attack range 2.
Count the [RUNE] rolled in each attack action and deal that much damage to another monster adjacent to the target.
flavour: This bunch of bones, bound by braided bamboo became the bane of the banished breathless.

name: Helmet
quest: Kill a brute or a skeleton. Take this helmet instead of the gold [XP].
effect: [DAMAGE]: Prevent 1 damage.
flavour: Radiating forcefulness.

name: Home Sewn Cape
quest: Spend 1 attack action when not adjacent to a monster. Your very own fabrication.
effect:
Add 1 [MANA] here very time you roll a [RUNE].
2[MANA]: Move 1 area.
3[MANA]: Prevent 2 damage.
flavour:
”Did Bjorn make this?”
”Sew it seams…”

name: Home Sewn Tunic
quest: Practice makes perfect. Spend 1 practice action and 1 experience [XP] to make it.
effect:
[DAMAGE]: Prevent 1 damage.
Spend 1 mend action to remoce all damage from this card.
flavour: When your life hangs by a thread, this is sturdier than it seams.

name: Leather Purse
quest: After killing a trollkin, take this bag and spawn 2 brutes next to you. They want the bag back.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Heal 2 damage from yourself or any adjacent hero.
flavour: Keeping your tools handy: thread, needles, bandages, herbs, and a pocket-sized mead sack.

name: Quiver
quest: Kill a rank 3 monster without getting the gold [XP]. Make this quiver instead.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Add 1 damage to this attack action.
flavour: Makes your enemies quiver in their boots.

name: Throwing Axes
quest: Spend 1 practice action in a forest to get your aim right.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Roll 3[DIE_ATTACK] against an adjacent monster.
flavour: I keep missing him…

name: Trollbane
quest: Collect 5 gold [XP] from killing trollkin to get a fearsome reputation.
effect: This is your Main Weapon. Attack range 2. Add 1 damage to attack actions against trollkin.
flavour: Once used to strangle the Trollfather. Not the conventional use of a bow, but hey, it worked.

name: Alva's Bracers
quest: Pay 5 gold [XP] on a road to have them imported from Alfheim.
effect: 3[MANA]: Perform an attack action.
flavour: Brace for impact!

name: Alva's First Bow
effect: This is your Main Weapon. Attack range 2.

name: Belt of Youth
quest: Enter 8 forest areas to gather support from the Elders.
effect: Heal 1 damage from Alva.
flavour: Ironically known as the Waist of Time, it actually carries rejuvenating powers.

name: Bloodline Crystal
quest: Discard 2 cards in Temple Ruins as you realize you're related to Gandalf, king of Alfheim.
effect:
3[MANA]: Add 2 damage to this attack action.
3[MANA]: Draw 1 card.
flavour: I'm … a princess? I knew it!

name: Elven Arrows
quest: Stand in the Troll Caves and spawn an adjacent troll. Oops!
flavour: Elven treasures long forgotten. Used as toothpicks for ages.

name: Elven Blade
quest: Kill 3 adjacent monsters to practice switching weapons.
effect: After each attack action, deal 1 damage to a monster adjacent to Alva.

name: Quiver
quest: Kill a rank 3 monster without getting the gold [XP]. Make this quiver instead.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Add 1 damage to this attack action.
flavour: Makes your enemies quiver in their boots.

name: Singing Bow
quest: When you have rolled 10[DIE_ATTACK] in forests, you have learned the songs of the trees.
effect:
This is your Main Weapon. Attack range 2.
After each attack action, add 1 mana [MANA] to any card.
flavour: Sings your swan song.

name: Throwing Darts
quest: Spend 1 practice action in a forest to get your aim right.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Roll 3[DIE_ATTACK] against an adjacent monster.
flavour: ”I'm ready to try it blindfolded…”

name: Tiara
quest: Find it in the Dark Forest. Turns out you're a princess after all!
effect: Starts with 6 gold [XP] on this card. Gain 1 gold [XP] from here each turn.

name: Windbite
quest: Kill 4 monsters at range 2 or more to get the sponsors lining up.
effect:
This is your Main Weapon. Attack range 2.
Whenever you roll [RUNE], add another [DIE_ATTACK] to your roll for each [RUNE].
flavour: It anticipates your wishes.

name: Blade Decorations
quest: Pay 2 gold [XP] in Grimheim to decorate your sword.
flavour: Now this is what I call a broad sword.

name: Custom Armor
quest: Pay 4 gold [XP] to have it made. Then get anormored with it.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Prevent 2 damage.
flavour: Armor is the blacksmith's strong suit.

name: Flimsy Blade
flavour: This miserable heirloom doesn't look like much, and it's not nearly as good as it looks...

name: Healing Potion
quest: Spend 1 mend action in the Witch Cabin to let it brew.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Heal 1 damage from yourself or any adjacent hero. May be used any number of times per turn.
flavour: This mead is barely legal.

name: Heels
quest: Spend 1 mend action and discard 2 cards in the Witch Cabin. That witch had style!
effect: Deal 1 damage to an adjacent monster.
flavour: High heels can be sooo painful.

name: Helmet
quest: Kill a brute or a skeleton. Take this instead of the gold [XP].
effect: [DAMAGE]: Prevent 1 damage.
flavour: Heading for trouble.

name: Leg Guards
quest: Spend 1 focus action. They're that tight.
flavour: Keeps my legs pretty, and leaves funny marks on their faces.

name: Raven's Claw
quest: Enter 10 forest areas to search for the long-forgotten sword.
effect: This is your Main Weapon. Add 2 damage to each attack action.
flavour: The ancient sword Hrafnakló was forged from an alloy of celestial iron and silver.

name: Tailored Boots
quest: Pay the shoemaker 2 gold [XP] in town. He'll heel your shoes and save their soles.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Move 1 area.
flavour: Fooling your foes with fancy footwork.

name: Throwing Knives
quest: Spend 1 practice action in a forest to get your aim right.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Roll 3 [DIE_ATTACK] against an adjacent monster.
flavour: Now between the fingers...

name: Warrior Shield
quest: Spend 1 attack action, "negotiating" with the traveling merchant.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Prevent 1 damage and draw 1 card.
flavour: A backup disc to save your life.

name: Wildfire Blade
quest: Spend 1 mend action in the Spewing Mountain to forge it.
effect: This is your Main Weapon. After each attack action, deal 1 damage to an adjacent monster.
flavour: Forged in the flames of kidnapped sprites.

name: Battle Boots
quest: Spend 1 focus action to permanently attach them to your feet.
flavour: Stepping on every toe within range.

name: Boldur's First Pick
effect: This is your Main Weapon.
flavour: Picks anything, even noses.

name: Dvalin's Pick
quest: End your movement adjacent to 3 mountain areas. The tomb had better be there!
effect: Spend an attack action to gain 1 gold [XP], 1 mana [MANA], and draw one card.
flavour: Dvalin, who made the Brisingamen jewelry for Freyja, was buried between two mountain walls.

name: Dwarf Helm
quest: Spend 2 gold [XP] in the Temple Ruins. A bowl is a good start.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Prevent 1 damage.
flavour: People hit what they can reach. On Boldur, that's mainly his head.

name: Dwarf Mail
quest: Enter 7 areas adjacent to mountains. Silly family tradition!
effect: Prevent the first damage dealt to Boldur each monster turn.
flavour: Wearing this, Boldur is quite a hot male.

name: Dwarf Pick
quest: Kill 3 monsters, then you get this from an anonymous admirer.
flavour: ”Boldur, this is for you, so you know I would always pick you! X O X O”

name: Eitri's Pick
quest: End your movement adjacent to 4 monsters or 1 legend to pick a fight.
effect: This is your Main Weapon. When you use Rapid Strike, add 2 [DIE_ATTACK] to that attack action.
flavour: Used by Eitiri, who forged Thor's hammer Mjölnir.

name: Mining Equipment
quest: Pay 1 gold [XP] for the equipment. Then pay 2 gold [XP] for insureance and taxes.
effect:
[DAMAGE]: Gain 2 gold [XP] if you stand adjacent to a mountain area.
[DAMAGE]: Gain 3 gold [XP] if you stand adjacent to 3 mountain areas.
flavour: I'm digging this gold rush…

name: Orebiter
quest: Lose 2 gold[XP]. The potential gain is endless.
effect: You may attack adjacent mountain areas. For each damage dealt, gain 1 gold [XP].
flavour: It's an auto-pick.

name: Precision Axes
quest: Spend 1 practice action in a forest to get access to these.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Deal 1 unpreventable damage to an adjacent monster.
flavour: Boldur is not happy until he can fell a tree in one throw.

name: Shield
quest: Enter the Ogre Valley or skip the gold [XP] from killing a troll.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Prevent 2 damage.
flavour: Breaking off one side of a troll breastplate should do the trick

name: Smiterbiter
quest: End your movementin the Marsh of Sorrow, covered to the beard in yuck.
effect: This is your Main Weapon. If you kill a monster in an attack action, any excess damage may be stored here (max 3 stored). Damage stored here may be added to your attack action.
flavour: I axed your first.

name: Cane
effect: [DAMAGE]: Move 1 area.
flavour: His cane is comforting – it makes him quite hopful.

name: Drink of the Tides
quest: End your movement next to water to gather the seaweed.
effect: Heal 1 damage from Finkel or an adjacent hero.

name: Element Ring
quest: Spend a mend action adjacent to mountain, plains, and forest.
effect: Add 1 damage to each attack action.
flavour: Forged where the elements meet, this ring rules them all.

name: Lightning Rod
quest: Spend a prepare action and 4 experience [XP] to install it.
effect: Each time you damage a monster, you may spend 1 mana [MANA] from any card to deal 1 additional damage.
flavour: Magic well grounded.

name: Magic Cape
quest: Spend a prepare action in the Wyrm Lair to gather the shed skin.
effect: A fashion accessory to display your cape-abilities. It's got you covered.

name: Power Staff
quest: Deal 3 damage to yourself in the Temple Ruins.
effect: This is your Main Weapon. Attack range 2.
flavour: The hidden dungeon of the old ruin is not safe. At least not with Finkel there…

name: Ring of Au
quest: Remove 7 [MANA] from your cards to make the magical inscriptions.
effect:
[DAMAGE]: Heal 2 damage from yourself or any adjacent hero.
[DAMAGE]: Deal 2 damage to an adjacent monster.
flavour: Ow, ow, ow!

name: Rune Scroll
quest: Spend 2 practice actions to study the runes.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Draw 1 card.

name: Sacred Scroll
quest: Enter the Highlands to stumble upon it.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Draw 1 card.
flavour: Arcane letters, archaic language, but beyond that, new spells to be learned.

name: Wand
quest: Discard 2 cards from hand. Nobody gets the first few spells right.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Add 1 mana [MANA] to 1 of your cards.
flavour: Now extra long, to support wand-ering.

name: Wand of Excessive Power
quest: Discard 3 cards from hand to hotwire it.
effect: This is your Main Weapon. After each attack action, add 1 mana [MANA] to any card.
flavour: It's definitely not free of charge.

name: Wizard's Hat
quest: Spend 4 mana [MANA] to conjure a… groundhog!? I bet you didn't expect that!
effect: When you roll any number of [DIE_ATTACK], roll 1 additional [DIE_ATTACK].
flavour: Hatters gonna hat.

name: Blessed Staff
quest: Spend 1 attack action in Dead Plains to unearth it.
effect: This is your Main Weapon. All [RUNE] count as hits for you.
flavour: Buried with its hopefully still-dead owner, it radiates power.

name: Circle of Life
effect: Damage dealt to Sindra may be placed on Circle of Life instead. Each time you use a mend action, repair 1 damage from Circle of Life.

name: Cursed Heirloom
quest: Equip this for free, if you dare.
effect: Before your first action each turn, you must take 1 damage. Then draw a card if possible.
flavour: This ancient hand-me-down has claimed the lives of 3 of Sindra's kin.

name: Element Staff
quest: Play 6 cards to get attuned to its powers.
effect: This is your Main Weapon. After each attack action, add 1[MANA] here. You may remove up to 3[MANA] from here to add that much damage to your attack action.
flavour: It's elemental stuff.

name: Healing Potion
quest: Spend 1 mend action in the Witch Cabin to let it brew.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Heal 1 damage from yourself or any adjacent hero. May be used any number of times per turn.
flavour: Life in a botle.

name: Magic Cape
quest: Spend a prepare action in the Wyrm Lair to gather the shed skin.
effect: You always have cover.
flavour: Natural camouflage.

name: Mana Crystal
quest: Enter a plains area in the Spewing Mountain to search the lava flows.
effect: Remove any number of mana [MANA] from here to prevent that much damage against you or another hero within range 2.
flavour: At the slopes of the Spewing Mountain, where ancient rocks hide arcane stones.

name: Sacred Scroll
quest: Enter the Highlands to stumble upon it.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Draw 1 card.
flavour: Arcane letters, archaic language, but beyond that, new spells to be learned.

name: Sindra's Amulet
quest: Enter Nailfare. Place a card from your discard pile under this card.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Perform the effect of the card under this.
flavour: Ritual magic, trapped in a crystal.

name: Trinket
quest: Use 5 mana [MANA] in a single turn to conjure it accidentally.
effect: 3[MANA]: If you have used your 2 actions this turn, perform one of the 4 remaining actions.
flavour: It is the little things in life that inspire.

name: Wand
quest: Discard 2 cards from hand. Nobody gets the first few spells right.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Add 1 mana [MANA] to 1 of your cards.
flavour: Now extra long, to support wand-ering.

name: Wizard's Hat
quest: Spend 4 mana [MANA] to conjure a rabbit. Only then will you be worthy of this hat.
flavour: Hatters gonna hat.

name: Back Down
effect: Choose a rank 1 or rank 2 monster within attack range that is closer to Grimheim than you. Kill it.
flavour: Let's call it a warning shot.

name: Burning Arrows
effect: Deal 1 damage to a monster within attack range, or 2 damage if that monster stands in a forest.
flavour: Don't aim for too long!

name: Limber Bow
effect: You have attack range +2 this turn.
flavour: Twannng!

name: Master Shot
effect: Add 2 damage to this attack action.
flavour: I wondered where the arrow went. Then it hit me…

name: Perfect Aim
effect: Reroll all misses.
flavour: Hitting where it hurts, not always in the head.

name: Piercing Arrows
effect: Play after one of your dice rolls. Add 1 damage for each [RUNE].
flavour: Make sure the arrow head is sterilized!

name: Prey
effect: mark an undamaged rank 3 monster or an undamaged Legend with 2 gold [XP] markers. It is worth +2 gold [XP].
flavour: Pray for your life.

name: Rest
effect: Heal 2 damage from Bjorn.
flavour: Sea therapy, works every time...

name: Seek Shelter
effect: Move up to 2 areas into a location. You may not move more this turn.
flavour: Phew, lucky there was a cave here… Who's snoring?

name: Sewing
effect: Remove 1 damage from each of your cards.
flavour: Needles to say, sewing has been a common thread in Bjorn's crafts.

name: Agility
effect: Move 2 areas. Just because you can.

name: Back Down!
effect: Choose a rank 1 or rank 2 monster within attack range that is closer to Grimheim than you. Kill it.
flavour: Let's call it a warning shot.

name: Inspire Defense
effect: Spend 2 mana [MANA] in Grimheim to add 1 Town Piece.
flavour: Anything for you, Alva!

name: Mastery
effect: Add 4[DIE_ATTACK] to this attack action.
flavour: When they don't get the hint at the first arrow, add some more…

name: Multi-Shot
effect: Choose up to 2 monsters within attack range. Roll 2[DIE_ATTACK] against each.
flavour: Two-for-one deal, express delivery.

name: Piercing Arrows
effect: Play after one of your dice rolls. Add 1 damage for each [RUNE].
flavour: Make sure the arrow head is sterilized!

name: Popular
effect: Play in Grimheim to gain 2 gold [XP].
flavour: I could get used to this…

name: Prey
effect: mark an undamaged rank 3 monster or an undamaged Legend with 2 gold [XP] markers. It is worth +2 gold [XP].
flavour: Pray for your life.

name: Rest
effect: Heal 2 damage from Alva.
flavour: If you defend the village, I'll take care of the rest.

name: Speedy Attack
effect: Discard another card from hand to perform an attack action.

name: Take a Knee
effect: Choose a non-Legend monster within attack range. It may not move during the monster turn.
flavour: Just what he kneeded.

name: Courage
effect: Choose an adjacent legend or rank 3 monster. Deal 2 damage to it.
flavour: The bigger they are, the harder they fall.

name: Durability
effect: Remove all damage from an equipment card.

name: Kick
effect: Deal 1 damage to an adjacent monster and move it 1 area.
flavour: I get a kick out of you.

name: Magic Runes
effect: If you rolled a [RUNE], add 3 damage.
flavour: These runes were made by the famous Blade Runer.

name: Maneuver
effect: Move 1 area.
flavour: Embla has a way of tackling her problems from many angles.

name: Preparations
effect: Spend a prepare action to draw cards until you have 4.
flavour: Ready, set... Wait - you're still getting dressed?

name: Rest
effect: Heal 2 damage from Embla.
flavour: If you defend the village, I'll take care of the rest.

name: Retaliation
effect: Play after an adjacent monster attacked you to deal 2 damage to it.

name: Sophisticated
effect: Play in Grimheim to perform a mend, focus, prepare, or practice action.
flavour: That's my cup of tea.

name: Speedy Attack
effect: Discard another card from hand to perform an attack action.

name: Vigilance
effect: Play after the Monsters Move step. Deal 1 damage to an adjacent monster.
flavour: Under cover, over confident.

name: Berserk
effect: Take 1 unpreventable damage to add 3 damage to this attack.
flavour: Grr… Wraaaaaaah!

name: Boldur's Gate
effect: Spend 2 gold [XP] in Grimheim to gain 1 town piece.
flavour: Narrow is the gate that leads to the inn.

name: Dodge
effect: Prevent up to 2 damage.
flavour: Did you miss me?

name: Durability
effect: Remove all damage from an equipment card.
flavour: Can't even handle the mead?

name: Focus
effect: Spend a focus action to gain 1 experience [XP], add 1 mana [MANA] to any card, and draw 1 card.
flavour: Think, think… think.

name: Kick
effect: Deal 1 damage to an adjacent monster and move it 1 area.
flavour: I get a kick out of you.

name: Maneuver
effect: Move 1 area.

name: Miner
effect: Gain 2 gold [XP] if you are adjacent to a mountain area.
flavour: All dwarves are minors until they turn fifty.

name: Portable Smithy
effect: Spend 1 prepare action to complete your quest.
flavour: Travel-sized anvil. Check!

name: Rest
effect: Heal 2 damage from Boldur.
flavour: I need a hospital… no, I need a tavern…

name: Seek Shelter
effect: Move up to 2 areas into a location. You may not move more this turn.
flavour: It's not fleeing, it's a tactical retreat.

name: Short Temper
effect: Kill an adjacent monster with no more than 2 remaining health.
flavour: Beware! Boldur's brutal blows bring bad bruises.

name: Blinding Flash
effect: Play before a monster attacks you. Ignore the attack.
flavour: Survival tactic: flash someone!

name: Blown Away
effect: Move anyone within range 2 up to 2 areas.
flavour: His presence can do that to you.

name: Burning Aura
effect: After each step you take this turn, you and every adjacent character take 1 unpreventable damage.
flavour: He's so hot right now.

name: Chain Lightning
effect: Choose a monster within range 2. Roll 2[DIE_ATTACK] against it, and 2[DIE_ATTACK] against another monster adjacent to it.
flavour: If the voltage doesn't kill you, the electric bill will.

name: Durability
effect: Remove all damage from an equipment card.

name: Heat Death
effect: Play when you rolled any [RUNE] against a non-Legend monster to kill it.

name: Heat Stroke
effect: Remove 2 mana [MANA]. Roll 6[DIE_ATTACK] against an adjacent monster.
flavour: Monsters don't use sunblock. Too bad for them.

name: Lightning Bolt
effect: Deal 1 damage to a monster within range 3.
flavour: You're in for a shock!

name: Power Surge
effect: Add 2 mana [MANA] to 1 of your cards.

name: Quick Reflexes
effect: After the Monsters Move step, move 1 area.
flavour: Now you see me, now you… still see me, but further away. Ain't that impressive?

name: Rain of Fire
effect: Deal 1 damage to each adjacent monster.

name: Alchemy
effect: Remove up to 5 mana [MANA] to gain that much gold [XP].
flavour: It is a golden opportunity.

name: Bowling
effect: Choose an adjacent area and the area directly behind it. Any monsters there are dealt 1 damage and may be moved 1 area.
flavour: Spare no one.

name: Focus
effect: Spend 1 focus action to gain 1 experience [XP], add 1 mana [MANA] to any card, and draw 1 card.
flavour: What was that recipe again?

name: Hard Rock
effect: Roll 3[DIE_ATTACK] against a monster within range 2.
flavour: She will, she will, rock you!

name: Heavy Metal
effect: Pay 1 or 2 gold [XP] and choose a monster within range 2. Deal 2 damage to it for each [XP] paid.
flavour: You want a ton of gold? You won't like it.

name: Lava Spike
effect: Count all mana [MANA] on 1 of your cards and roll that many [DIE_ATTACK] against an adjacent monster (max 10[DIE_ATTACK]).
flavour: Solid spikes made of liquid lava? Sounds impossible, but Sindra nailed it.

name: Petrify
effect: Spend 2 mana [MANA] to kill a rank 2 monster within range 2.
flavour: Your fate is set in stone.

name: Power Surge
effect: Add 2 mana [MANA] to 1 of your cards.

name: Stoneskin
effect: Prevent up to 2 damage.
flavour: Sticks and stones can't break my bones…

name: Bjorn
effect: After any dice roll, you may spend 1 focus action to add 2 damage.
flavour:
Bjorn is the self-made man. At least, his clothes are self-made.
Not much of them remain – he learned from an early age that he must rip what he has sewn.
With his great strength, his needles and arrows can pierce anything.

name: Bjorn
effect: After any dice roll, you may spend 1 focus action to add 3 damage.
flavour: Bjorn can solve any problem, including the problems caused by his previous solutions.

name: Alva
effect: End your move action in a forest to add 1 mana [MANA] to any card.
flavour: Alva learned archery from her father at an early age. She can hit a butterfly at 50 paces, but she would never dream of doing that – butterflies are pretty!

name: Alva
effect: End any movement in a forset to add 1 mana [MANA] to any card.
flavour: ”I don't understand why I should keep my distance? After all, they are only three trolls, and I have many more than three arrows.”

name: Embla
effect: Move 4.
flavour: Embla is fast, really tough, and passionately competetive. She is inarguably the best defender of Grimheim... because you just don't argue with her.

name: Embla
effect: Move 4.
flavour: All creatures are precious to Embla. Their exact worth is determined by the bounty.

name: Boldur
effect: Armor. (Always prevents 1 damage)
flavour: Ants can carry several times their own body weight. So can Boldur. He's forging his thick armor to prove this point, and promote heavy metal.

name: Boldur
effect: Armor. (Always prevents 1 damage)
flavour: Going berserk at the local inn, Boldur spent a drunken evening challenging all visitors to arm-wrestling. He broke the tavern record as well as fifteen arms, earning him the nickname the Arm-y.

name: Finkel
effect: For each [RUNE] you roll, add 1 mana [MANA] to Fireball.
flavour: Newly graduated from the pyromaniac program of the Wizarding School for Elven Orphans Who Can't Read Good, Finkel sets out to cause the heat of battle. A warm welcome to everyone!

name: Finkel
effect: For each [RUNE] you roll, add 1 mana [MANA] to Fireball.
flavour: Today's forecast shows fire and brimstone over large parts of the countryside.

name: Sindra
effect: 3[MANA]: Spend a move action to move to ANY area (even mountains).
flavour: The friendly neighborhood grandma, suddenly appearing with surprises for all: milk and cookies for the kids, and hails of levitating rocks for her enemies.

name: Sindra
effect: 3[MANA]: Spend ANY action to move to ANY area (even mountains).
flavour: Sindra now uses her short fuse to ignite powerful explosions.
